name: Boston Brown Bread - Crockpot
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the whole wheat and rye flour, cornmeal, baking soda, and salt in a large bowl.
2. Make a well in the center of the dry ingredients and pour in the molasses, buttermilk, and raisins.
3. Stir until all the ingredients are fully incorporated.
4. Grease a 2-quart mold, then flour it lightly.
5. Fill the mold with the batter, ensuring it does not exceed two-thirds full.
6. Cover the mold loosely with foil and secure with string.
7. Place the mold on a trivet in the bottom of the slow cooker.
8. Pour hot water into the pot below the mold, then cover the pot and cook on High for 3 to 4 hours.
9. The bread is ready when the top is dry and pulls away from the edge of the mold.
10. Remove the bread from the trivet and let it cool on a rack for 10 minutes before turning out and serving.
Makes 1 loaf.
